name: Kevin's Killer Vegetarian Chili with Jalapeno
recipeIngredient: 1 can Dark red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except beer, in a large pot and mix well.
2. Gradually add the beer to the mixture as the chili comes to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and continue cooking for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally to ensure even mixing.
Note: The attribution line and source information have been removed as per the instructions.
